motivationalQuotes.text: Your health is an investment, not an expense. Prioritize yourself today!
Every cycle is a reminder of your body's incredible strength and resilience.
Listen to your body. It knows what it needs.
Self-care is not selfish. Taking care of yourself helps you care for others.
You are stronger than you think. Your body is proof of that.
Wellness is a journey, not a destination. Celebrate every step forward!
Your cycle is unique, just like you. Embrace it with grace.
Taking time for your health is never time wasted.
You deserve to feel good in your body every single day.
Progress over perfection. Every small step counts!

foodRecommendations.title: Iron-Rich Foods
foodRecommendations.text: Try spinach, lean red meat, or fortified cereals during menstruation to help combat fatigue and replenish iron lost through bleeding.

foodRecommendations.title: Calcium Boost
foodRecommendations.text: Incorporate dairy products, almonds, and leafy greens to ease cramps and support bone health throughout your cycle.

foodRecommendations.title: Omega-3 Power
foodRecommendations.text: Eat salmon, walnuts, and flaxseeds to reduce inflammation and support mood stability during your cycle.

foodRecommendations.title: Energy-Boosting Snack
foodRecommendations.text: Combine whole grain toast with almond butter for sustained energy and hormone-supporting minerals.

foodRecommendations.title: Hydration Hero
foodRecommendations.text: Stay hydrated with water, herbal teas, and coconut water to reduce bloating and support overall wellness.

foodRecommendations.title: Magnesium-Rich Foods
foodRecommendations.text: Enjoy dark chocolate, pumpkin seeds, and almonds to ease mood swings and muscle tensions.

foodRecommendations.title: Protein Power
foodRecommendations.text: Include chicken, eggs, and legumes to maintain steady energy and support muscle recovery.

foodRecommendations.title: Vitamin C Support
foodRecommendations.text: Eat citrus fruits, berries, and bell peppers to enhance iron absorption and boost immunity.

foodRecommendations.title: Anti-Inflammatory Blend
foodRecommendations.text: Try turmeric-infused warm milk (golden milk) to reduce inflammation and support comfort.

foodRecommendations.title: Antioxidant Mix
foodRecommendations.text: Enjoy blueberries, green tea, and dark leafy greens to combat oxidative stress and support wellness.
